channel.title: Curations on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Curations on Junho Lee

item.title: Building an AI Agent Skill for the Korean Government Design System
item.description: How we built an AI-native skill set to let coding agents directly parse the KRDS design system and publish compliant web pages.

item.title: Better Terminal UX for LLM Code and Architecture Outputs
item.description: Codexplain is a local-first UX layer that formats messy LLM outputs, tables, and architecture diagrams without altering raw source code or JSON payloads.

item.title: How AI-Native Teams Rewrite the Engineering Playbook
item.description: AI-native teams are moving beyond simple API wrappers by embedding LLMs into their core engineering workflows and internal tools.

item.title: Open-Sourcing an AI Quant Trading Strategy for Semiconductor Stocks
item.description: This post shares an AI-driven quant trading strategy and a signal bot’s source code for semiconductor stocks, refined over three years of backtesting, illustrating AI’s impact on quantitative finance.

item.title: Clarifying AI Context with Knowledge Graphs
item.description: How codegraph and ActiveGraph use explicit node-and-edge relationships to eliminate token waste and prevent context loss in AI agents.

item.title: Automating Repetitive Development Workflows with AI
item.description: Learn how to analyze development history, identify repetitive patterns, and package them into reusable scripts using Codex.
